    label(PvP-7) A new weapon (2-0)
    title(PvP-7) A new weapon
    typekill
    descriptionWelcome to the Silver Wing Squadron! We've just finished developing a new weapon, the X27-S Smart Gun. This is a weapon specially designed to kill small, highly maneuverable ships. If you gain enough standing we'll share it with you. And remember: Never show the pirate scum any mercy!
